queries.query: SELECT 1

SELECT "public"."Project"."id", "public"."Project"."organizationId", "public"."Project"."name", "public"."Project"."description", "public"."Project"."logoUrl", "public"."Project"."status"::text, "public"."Project"."upiId", "public"."Project"."publicKey", "public"."Project"."secretKeyHash", "public"."Project"."createdAt", "public"."Project"."updatedAt", "public"."Project"."archivedAt", "public"."Project"."deletedAt", COALESCE("aggr_selection_0_Order"."_aggr_count_orders", 0) AS "_aggr_count_orders", COALESCE("aggr_selection_1_Product"."_aggr_count_products", 0) AS "_aggr_count_products" FROM "public"."Project" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "public"."Order"."projectId", COUNT(*) AS "_aggr_count_orders" FROM "public"."Order" WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY "public"."Order"."projectId") AS "aggr_selection_0_Order" ON ("public"."Project"."id" = "aggr_selection_0_Order"."projectId") LEFT JOIN (SELECT "public"."Product"."projectId", COUNT(*) AS "_aggr_count_products" FROM "public"."Product" WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY "public"."Product"."projectId") AS "aggr_selection_1_Product" ON ("public"."Project"."id" = "aggr_selection_1_Product"."projectId") WHERE ("public"."Project"."organizationId" = $1 AND "public"."Project"."deletedAt" IS NULL) ORDER BY "public"."Project"."createdAt" DESC OFFSET $2

SELECT "public"."Order"."id", "public"."Order"."status"::text, "public"."Order"."amount" FROM "public"."Order" LEFT JOIN "public"."Project" AS "j0" ON ("j0"."id") = ("public"."Order"."projectId") WHERE ("j0"."organizationId" = $1 AND "j0"."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ("j0"."id" IS NOT NULL)) OFFSET $2

SELECT "public"."Order"."id", "public"."Order"."publicId", "public"."Order"."projectId", "public"."Order"."productId", "public"."Order"."customerName", "public"."Order"."customerEmail", "public"."Order"."amount", "public"."Order"."currency", "public"."Order"."status"::text, "public"."Order"."submittedUtr", "public"."Order"."verifiedTransactionId", "public"."Order"."failureReason", "public"."Order"."matchedEmailId", "public"."Order"."matchedUtr", "public"."Order"."verificationSource", "public"."Order"."expiresAt", "public"."Order"."verifiedAt", "public"."Order"."failedAt", "public"."Order"."createdAt", "public"."Order"."updatedAt" FROM "public"."Order" LEFT JOIN "public"."Project" AS "j0" ON ("j0"."id") = ("public"."Order"."projectId") WHERE ("j0"."organizationId" = $1 AND ("j0"."id" IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY "public"."Order"."createdAt" DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3
SELECT "public"."Order"."id", "public"."Order"."amount", "public"."Order"."status"::text, "public"."Order"."projectId" FROM "public"."Order" WHERE "public"."Order"."projectId" IN ($1,$2,$3) OFFSET $4

SELECT "public"."WebhookEndpoint"."id", "public"."WebhookEndpoint"."status"::text, "public"."WebhookEndpoint"."projectId" FROM "public"."WebhookEndpoint" WHERE "public"."WebhookEndpoint"."projectId" IN ($1,$2,$3) OFFSET $4

SELECT "public"."WebhookDelivery"."id", "public"."WebhookDelivery"."status"::text, "public"."WebhookDelivery"."endpointId" FROM "public"."WebhookDelivery" WHERE "public"."WebhookDelivery"."endpointId" IN ($1) ORDER BY "public"."WebhookDelivery"."createdAt" DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "_count$_all" FROM (SELECT "public"."Notification"."id" FROM "public"."Notification" WHERE ("public"."Notification"."organizationId" = $1 AND "public"."Notification"."readAt" IS NULL AND "public"."Notification"."userId" IS NULL) OFFSET $2) AS "sub"
